name: baseline-operational-safety
description: One-click operational safety baseline covering prompt injection, data exfiltration, destructive tools, SQL abuse, unsafe egress, excessive agency, and monitoring.

block.title: Block prompt-injected secret exfiltration over HTTP
block.name: baseline_block_prompt_injection_secret_exfil_http
block.description: Blocks outbound requests that combine secret material with instruction-override language.

block.title: Block tool output requesting credential disclosure
block.name: baseline_block_tool_result_credential_disclosure
block.description: Blocks tool calls carrying injected instructions to send tokens or credentials.

block.title: Block system prompt disclosure request
block.name: baseline_block_system_prompt_disclosure_request
block.description: Blocks attempts to reveal hidden system or policy instructions.

block.title: Block credit card data sent over HTTP
block.name: baseline_block_http_credit_card_exfiltration
block.description: Blocks outbound HTTP requests containing cardholder data.

block.title: Block secrets in LLM calls
block.name: baseline_block_llm_secrets_disclosure
block.description: Blocks likely secrets from being sent to an LLM.

block.title: Block direct database deletion tool
block.name: baseline_block_delete_database_tool
block.description: Blocks direct database deletion tools.

block.title: Block recursive filesystem deletion
block.name: baseline_block_recursive_filesystem_deletion
block.description: Blocks recursive delete commands.

block.title: Block Terraform destroy
block.name: baseline_block_terraform_destroy
block.description: Blocks destructive infrastructure teardown.

block.title: Block kubectl delete
block.name: baseline_block_kubectl_delete
block.description: Blocks Kubernetes resource deletion.

block.title: Block cloud instance termination
block.name: baseline_block_cloud_instance_termination
block.description: Blocks cloud compute termination commands.

block.title: Block package unpublish
block.name: baseline_block_package_unpublish
block.description: Blocks package unpublish operations.

block.title: Block destructive SQL
block.name: baseline_block_destructive_sql
block.description: Blocks SQL classified as destructive.

block.title: Block unbounded SQL writes
block.name: baseline_block_unbounded_sql_writes
block.description: Blocks UPDATE or DELETE statements without a WHERE clause.

block.title: Block SQL privilege changes
block.name: baseline_block_sql_privilege_changes
block.description: Blocks GRANT, REVOKE, role, and user privilege changes.

block.title: Block SQL multi-statement chains
block.name: baseline_block_sql_multi_statement_chains
block.description: Blocks multi-statement SQL chains.

block.title: Block AWS instance metadata endpoint
block.name: baseline_block_aws_instance_metadata
block.description: Blocks access to AWS instance metadata credentials.

block.title: Block GCP metadata endpoint
block.name: baseline_block_gcp_instance_metadata
block.description: Blocks access to GCP metadata credentials.

block.title: Block pastebin egress
block.name: baseline_block_pastebin_egress
block.description: Blocks pastebin-like destinations commonly used for exfiltration.

block.title: Block ngrok tunnel egress
block.name: baseline_block_ngrok_tunnel_egress
block.description: Blocks ngrok tunnel destinations.

block.title: Block action after previous blocked trace step
block.name: baseline_block_after_previous_blocked_trace_step
block.description: Blocks follow-on actions in a trace after a prior step was blocked.

block.title: Block very high risk action
block.name: baseline_block_very_high_risk_action
block.description: Blocks actions whose enriched risk score is very high.

block.title: Block suspicious sequence with outbound request
block.name: baseline_block_suspicious_sequence_outbound_request
block.description: Blocks outbound requests when trace behavior is suspicious.

block.title: Block local environment secret file access
block.name: baseline_block_env_file_access
block.description: Blocks direct access to environment files that commonly store credentials.

block.title: Block GitHub token extraction command
block.name: baseline_block_github_token_extraction
block.description: Blocks extraction of GitHub CLI auth tokens.

block.title: Block remote script pipe execution
block.name: baseline_block_remote_script_pipe_execution
block.description: Blocks command patterns that execute fetched remote scripts.

warn.title: Warn on likely secrets in outbound HTTP
warn.name: baseline_warn_http_secrets_exfiltration
warn.description: Warns when outbound HTTP carries secret-like material to external hosts (review before hard blocking).

warn.title: Warn on instruction override language
warn.name: baseline_warn_instruction_override_language
warn.description: Warns when payloads contain common prompt injection override language.

warn.title: Warn on data exfiltration wording
warn.name: baseline_warn_data_exfiltration_wording
warn.description: Warns on explicit exfiltration wording in agent inputs or tool results.

warn.title: Warn on internal content
warn.name: baseline_warn_internal_content
warn.description: Warns on internal or confidential content.

warn.title: Warn on shell execution
warn.name: baseline_warn_shell_execution
warn.description: Warns on shell-capable tools even when no destructive command is detected.

warn.title: Warn on SQL schema enumeration
warn.name: baseline_warn_sql_schema_enumeration
warn.description: Warns when queries enumerate schemas or metadata tables.

warn.title: Warn on sensitive table access
warn.name: baseline_warn_sql_sensitive_table_access
warn.description: Warns when queries touch sensitive tables.

warn.title: Warn on raw GitHub egress
warn.name: baseline_warn_raw_github_egress
warn.description: Warns on raw GitHub content access, a common path for tool-output injection and payload staging.

warn.title: Warn after previous warned trace step
warn.name: baseline_warn_after_previous_warned_trace_step
warn.description: Warns when a trace continues after a prior warning.

warn.title: Warn on suspicious sequence
warn.name: baseline_warn_suspicious_sequence
warn.description: Warns when trace behavior indicates cross-tool, cross-domain, or prior-warning escalation.

warn.title: Warn on high risk action
warn.name: baseline_warn_high_risk_action
warn.description: Warns when enriched risk is high but below the hard block threshold.

warn.title: Warn on CI workflow file modification
warn.name: baseline_warn_ci_workflow_modification
warn.description: Warns when actions modify CI workflows that may alter trust boundaries.

monitor.title: Monitor all tool calls
monitor.name: baseline_monitor_all_tool_calls
monitor.description: Captures generic tool calls for trace visibility.
